label: Transparent snow fungus motif
workflow: Built-in image generation on a flat #00ff00 chroma-key background, then local chroma-key removal to transparent RGBA PNG.
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Snow Fungus transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a snow fungus motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A delicate snow fungus (Tremella fuciformis) cluster growing from a small amber-brown piece of subtropical forest wood. The fungus is translucent white jelly with thin ruffled lobes, pearly highlights, soft amber shadows from the wood, subtle wet gelatin texture, and crisp botanical accuracy. Include the small wood base as part of the motif because the palette needs white jelly, amber wood, and woodland shadow.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the full ruffled snow fungus and the full wood base without cropping. Clean studio lighting, no cast shadow, no floor plane.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no green moss, no leaves, no forest landscape, no second mushroom, no insects, no hand, no bowl, no wellness product packaging, no text, no watermark.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Snow Fungus light-mode design-system board
Input image role: The visible transparent snow fungus motif is the source reference for palette, texture, contrast, and visual language.
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Snow Fungus", derived from the visible transparent snow fungus cutout. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible delicate wellness product UI theme.
Canvas: exact wide landscape 16:9 composition, 3840 x 2160 4K-class board, no portrait crop, no square crop.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution source board, at least 2400px wide. Use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: Morphous Snow Fungus, Snow Fungus, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the visible motif only: translucent white jelly lobes, pearl highlights, warm amber wood, honeyed inner shadows, bark grain, soft subtropical forest shadow, and delicate wellness tone. The board must read as snow fungus on amber wood, not generic mushroom, coral, cauliflower, or medical stock UI.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance. Use labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Japanese UI. Keep all text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing tokens, radius tokens, border tokens, shadow tokens, texture samples, simple wellness/data icons.
Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style delicate wellness system, precise grid, 8px radius on cards and controls, pearl-rice surfaces, translucent jelly highlights, amber wood primary actions, honey secondary states, bark-shadow text and borders, subtle gelatin lobe texture and wood-grain texture. Quiet utilitarian product UI, not a marketing landing page.
Color constraints: use only motif-derived colors and near-neutrals from the motif. No unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no one-hue palette.
Text constraints: no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Snow Fungus" or "Snow Fungus", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Snow Fungus dark-mode design-system board
Input image roles: The visible transparent snow fungus motif is the source motif reference. The visible light-mode Morphous Snow Fungus board is the layout and component-language reference.
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Snow Fungus". It must feel like the same visible light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible snow fungus cutout.
Canvas: exact wide landscape 16:9 composition, 3840 x 2160 4K-class board, no portrait crop, no square crop.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution source board, at least 2400px wide. Use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: Morphous Snow Fungus, Snow Fungus, Dark Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
Reference use: Preserve motif-derived palette roles, component language, 8px radius, delicate wellness navigation, translucent jelly texture, amber wood grain, Japanese typography, dashboard/data charts, forms, tables, command/search, status states, tokens, spacing, and shadows.
Visual details: dark background derived from deep bark and subtropical forest shadow; foreground from pearl jelly and snow white; primary actions from amber wood; secondary accents from honeyed jelly shadow; surfaces from smoked parchment and bark shadow; borders from moss-shadow taupe; subtle wet jelly sheen and wood-grain texture overlays. Keep a delicate wellness identity even in dark mode.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance. Use labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Japanese UI. Keep all text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing tokens, radius tokens, border tokens, shadow tokens, texture samples, simple wellness/data icons.
Color constraints: use only motif-derived colors and near-neutrals from the motif. No neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no pure-black-only flat background, no one-hue palette.
Text constraints: no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Snow Fungus" or "Snow Fungus", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.
